# Amara Africa

> Private, considered African safaris built for Gulf travellers. A Dubai- and Cape Town-based private safari house with halal-aware service, Arabic-language access, and single-consultant continuity from first call to last goodbye. Founded 2025.

Amara Africa designs tailor-made luxury safaris and private journeys across Southern and East Africa for travellers from the UAE, Saudi Arabia and the wider Gulf. Every itinerary is written by hand for one household — not assembled from a package. Lodges are briefed in advance for halal-aware menus; Arabic-speaking hosts on request and when available.

- Positioning: Private African journeys. Crafted for the Gulf.
- Audience served: United Arab Emirates, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman.
- Languages: English and Arabic.
- Offices: Dubai (Jumeirah Village Circle) and Cape Town.
- Enquiries: WhatsApp +971 58 858 5960, or the private enquiry form at https://amarafrica.com/enquire

## Journeys

- [The Migration](https://amarafrica.com/journeys/the-migration): Timed to the Serengeti wildebeest crossing in Tanzania (Serengeti & Lamai). 7–10 nights.
- [The Grand Circuit](https://amarafrica.com/journeys/the-grand-circuit): A multi-country private journey across South Africa, Tanzania and Zambia with private air access. 12–16 nights.
- [The Family Legacy](https://amarafrica.com/journeys/the-family-legacy): Multi-generational safari in South Africa's Sabi Sand & Kruger, with private villa configurations and a children's programme. 7–14 nights.
- [Signature South Africa](https://amarafrica.com/journeys/the-cape-and-kruger): Cape Town, Grootbos and Monwana — a refined city, coast and Big Five safari journey. 10 days / 9 nights.
- [The Singita Signature](https://amarafrica.com/journeys/the-singita-signature): Six nights at Cape Grace in Cape Town, then Singita Big Five safari at Ebony Lodge (Sabi Sand) and Sweni Lodge (Kruger). 14 days / 13 nights.
- [The Falls & Delta](https://amarafrica.com/journeys/the-falls-and-delta): Victoria Falls and Africa's great water wonders. 7–10 nights.
- [The Coastal Escape](https://amarafrica.com/journeys/the-coastal-escape): Zanzibar's coral coast — overwater villas, Halal cuisine and total seclusion. 5–8 nights.

## Key pages

- [The Collection (all journeys)](https://amarafrica.com/journeys)
- [The Experience](https://amarafrica.com/the-experience)
- [About](https://amarafrica.com/about): A small house founded in 2025, with offices in Dubai and Cape Town.
- [Enquire Privately](https://amarafrica.com/enquire)
- [The Gulf Family's Guide to South Africa](https://amarafrica.com/guide): Free planning guide for Gulf families — malaria-free Big Five reserves, direct flights and time zones from the GCC, exclusive-use villas, seasons and honest pricing.
- [Begin Your Trip Design](https://amarafrica.com/trip-design): A dedicated senior designer and a complete private itinerary for a design fee of AED 5,000, credited in full against the journey.

## What makes Amara Africa distinct

- Halal-aware dining arranged quietly at every lodge; Arabic-speaking hosts on request and when available.
- A single senior consultant holds each booking from first call to last goodbye.
- Built specifically for Gulf travellers, in English and Arabic.
- Private, tailor-made itineraries — every journey is a starting point, re-written for the individual household, never a fixed package.
